architectReview.evidence: Initial architecture/product/code review (20-G002ArchReview3) verified explicit new-chat allocation, /tmp scratch fallback, Help focus trap with Escape and trigger restoration, transport/domain error separation, offline RPC disabling, visible extension inspection, and user-facing deferred copy; it blocked on two MEDIUM findings: case-sensitive drive-qualified Windows redaction and raw thread.title in the SessionActions aria-label. Both were fixed (directory-logic.ts case-insensitive rule + mixed-case tests; SessionActions displayThread redaction for aria-label and both confirmation flows + accessible-label test). Recheck 25-G002ArchRecheck returned Status: CLEAR, Verdict: APPROVE with no findings.

executorQa.reviewer: executor subagent 21-G002ExecQa3 (independent) plus leader live automation
executorQa.evidence: Independent executor red-team (21-G002ExecQa3) passed all five live harness scenarios with six fresh non-uniform 2048x1290 screenshots; leader automation independently verified the same flows and produced a structured schemaVersion-1 transcript plus two 1440x1000 non-uniform screenshots. Scenarios covered blank scratch /tmp start with reply, explicit distinct chat allocation, clipboard failure isolation ('Could not copy' while connected), and secret redaction ([redacted] without synthetic-server-unavailable-key / synthetic-token-rejected-value) with disabled Start/Browse/composer and a Reconnect control.

surfaceEvidence.description: All live probes passed: scratch /tmp start with reply, explicit distinct chat allocation, help focus trap/Escape/restoration, extension inspection details, clipboard failure isolation, and secret-redacted connection failures with offline control disabling.

adversarialCases.scenario: Clipboard writeText rejects while copying the latest assistant answer
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Copy surfaces a failure status ('Could not copy') without disconnecting; composer and transcript remain usable; no clipboard write recorded
adversarialCases.description: Observed 'Could not copy' status, connection badge stayed connected, composer enabled, transcript preserved, zero synthetic clipboard writes.

adversarialCases.scenario: Endpoint resolution fails with a secret-bearing server-unavailable error (synthetic-server-unavailable-key)
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Visible error shows [redacted] detail without the synthetic secret; Start/Browse/composer disable; Reconnect stays available
adversarialCases.description: Observed 'server unavailable: api_key=[redacted]', secret absent, RPC controls disabled, Reconnect enabled.

adversarialCases.scenario: Connection fails with a secret-bearing token-rejected error (synthetic-token-rejected-value)
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Visible error shows [redacted] detail without the synthetic secret; Start/Browse/composer disable; Reconnect stays available
adversarialCases.description: Observed 'token rejected: token=[redacted]', secret absent, RPC controls disabled, Reconnect enabled.

adversarialCases.scenario: Session titles, recents, and accessible labels carry POSIX and mixed-case Windows home paths
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: No username reaches any rendered or accessibility surface; paths collapse to ~ forms
adversarialCases.description: directory-logic mixed-case tests plus SessionActions accessible-label test pass; live scratch flow observed no raw home path.

contractCoverage.obligation: Recent-directory and persisted-session path redaction, including mixed-case Windows drive paths and accessible session-action labels
Help dialog implements a real focus trap with Escape handling and trigger focus restoration
Sanitized connection errors and clipboard failures proven with adversarial live evidence
Live browser artifacts with scratch-flow/adversarial action-level evidence and screenshot provenance

rerunCommands: bun test src/**/*.test.ts src/**/*.test.tsx (packages/gjc-gui: 117 pass, 0 fail)
iteration.evidence: Iteration 1: initial architect review rejected with two MEDIUM findings while executor QA passed. Iteration 2: fixed case-insensitive Windows redaction and SessionActions label redaction, added regression tests, then fully reran the GUI suite (117/117), the gjc-gui type check, the root check:ts workspace gate, and structural rebase checks (clean diff, origin/dev ancestor). Architect recheck approved with no findings.
